JHIN-COMMON_SHOT.title: Common Shot
JHIN-GRACEFUL_FOOTWORK.title: Graceful Footwork
JHIN-AIM_SHOT.title: Aim Shot
JHIN-SET_THE_STAGE.title: Set the Stage
JHIN-SET_THE_STAGE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Apply 1 [gold]Mark[/gold] to a random enemy.
JHIN-SET_TRAP.title: Set a Trap
JHIN-SET_TRAP.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Apply 1 [gold]Lotus Trap[/gold] to the target.
JHIN-GRAND_STAGE.title: Grand Stage
JHIN-GRAND_STAGE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Apply 1 [gold]Lotus Trap[/gold] to all enemies.
JHIN-LONG_RANGE_SNIPE.title: Long-Range Snipe
JHIN-LONG_RANGE_SNIPE.description: Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deal {markDamagePerStack} additional damage per [gold]Mark[/gold] on the target.
JHIN-DEADLY_FLOURISH.title: Deadly Flourish
JHIN-DEADLY_FLOURISH.description: Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the target has [gold]Mark[/gold], apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]. [gold]Flourish[/gold]: apply 2 instead.
JHIN-RELOAD.title: Reload
JHIN-CURTAIN_CALL.title: Curtain Call
JHIN-CURTAIN_CALL.description: Can only be played with 0 [gold]Bullets[/gold]. Attack random enemies {shotCount} times for {Damage:diff()} damage. Lower-HP targets take more damage, up to {maxDamageBonusPercent}% more. Exhaust.
JHIN-SHOOT_DISABLED_NO_BULLETS: The chamber is empty... but art never relied on gunpowder.
